description_long: This is a male adult figure depicted in a casual urban outfit, featuring a button-up shirt worn over a t-shirt, paired with fitted pants and sneakers. The figure has a full beard and mustache, and the hair is styled in a medium-length bun at the back of the head. The arms are slightly bent and extended outward, with hands relaxed and fingers naturally splayed. The facial expression is neutral, and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions. The clothing is loose-fitting and appropriate for everyday city environments, suggesting comfort and practicality. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure stands in a relaxed, upright posture.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure with a button-up shirt, pants, sneakers, and hair in a bun, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, button-up shirt, t-shirt underneath, pants, sneakers, and arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bun hairstyle, and the relaxed posture of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with the bun, the shirt's back, and the straight alignment of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, bun, and side details of the clothing and posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt over a t-shirt, fitted pants, and casual sneakers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a bun
